summary: iOS | Images in User Guides section (PLACEHOLDER)
scenario: Only the top 6 device images load in User Guides; remaining devices show placeholder images instead of loading properly.
description_clean: In the User Guides section under App Settings, only images for the top 6 devices are loaded; all other devices show placeholder images instead. Expected behavior is that all images load properly when opening the User Guides page.
steps: Locate and open the User Guides section.
Observe the device images displayed on the page.
expected: All device images load properly when opening the User Guides page.
actual: Only images for the top 6 devices are loaded; all other devices show placeholder images instead.
